description.overview: A close cousin to the smooth Vizsla but with a protective wiry coat. They're equally affectionate and athletic, with better protection from cold weather.
description.history: The Wirehaired Vizsla originated in Hungary.
description.temperament: Known for being gentle, loyal, trainable.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense, wiry coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A close cousin to the smooth Vizsla but with a protective wiry coat. They're equally affectionate and athletic, with better protection from cold weather.
